news.t: AI can do a lot of things — like tearing down your stock portfolio and adding risk
AI-powered stock ETFs were hyped as superior investments. Then reality hit.
Amplify ETFs Declares June Income Distributions for its ETFs
Amplify ETFs Completes Acquisition to Reach $9.1 Billion AUM Across 31 ETFs
These are the top 10 holdings of the AI-driven investment fund powered by Watson that has been crushing the market this year
An artificial-intelligence powered ETF has smashed the S&P 500 in the last month - without any meme stocks

holdings.infoBox: AIEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 163 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.28%, Apple at 5.72%, Garmin at 4.21%, Alphabet at 3.60%, and Microsoft at 3.43%.

overview.description: The Amplify AI Powered Equity ETF (AIEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the AI Powered Equity index. The fund tracks an index that holds US companies of any market cap selected using a proprietary, quantitative model based on artificial intelligence. AIEQ was launched on Oct 17, 2017 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: AI can do a lot of things — like tearing down your stock portfolio and adding risk
data.text: New study shows AI stock-trading tools lagged a basic S&P 500 fund. AI-powered ETFs have similar results.

data.title: AI-powered stock ETFs were hyped as superior investments. Then reality hit.
data.text: It's tempting to think that computers can make better investment decisions than we can.

data.text: The AIEQ ETF is fully invested in the stock market, which according to DataTrek Research means it expects a continuation of the recent equity rally.

data.title: An artificial-intelligence powered ETF has smashed the S&P 500 in the last month - without any meme stocks
data.text: Artificial-intelligence based ETF AIEQ avoided meme stocks despite being sensitive to momentum as its algorithm analysed millions of pieces of data.
